name: retrostrap-homepage-services
description: The counter and guestbook backend for retrostrap homepages, a Lambda over one on-demand DynamoDB table (infra/README.md). Webring is client-side.
comment: The AWS SDK is the deploy-time binding only (ops-dynamo.js, handler.js); the tested core (services.js, dynamo-store.js) has no runtime dependencies, and the SDK ships in the Lambda Node runtime so it need not be bundled. src/server.js remains for self-hosting without AWS.
